G

generateCountryMap() - Method in class util.TransportDataGenerator
Generates a 2D array representing the country map.
generateData() - Method in class util.TransportDataGenerator
Generates a complete set of transportation data, including the country map, stations within each city, and various departures from these stations.
generateDeparture(String, String, int, int) - Method in class util.TransportDataGenerator
Generates a single Departure object with random characteristics.
generateDepartures(List<Station>) - Method in class util.TransportDataGenerator
Generates a list of Departure objects based on the provided list of stations.
generateStations() - Method in class util.TransportDataGenerator
Generates a list of Station objects, one for each city in the country map.

getArrivalTime() - Method in class graph.Graph.Path
 
getBusStation() - Method in class model.Station
Returns the unique identifier of the bus station.
getCity() - Method in class graph.Node
 
getCity() - Method in class model.Station
Returns the name of the city associated with this station.
getCountryMap() - Method in class model.TransportData
Returns the 2D array representing the country map.
getDepartureDetails() - Method in class graph.Edge
 
getDepartures() - Method in class model.TransportData
Returns the list of all departures.
getDepartureTime() - Method in class model.Departure
Returns the scheduled departure time.
getDepartureTimeInMinutes() - Method in class model.Departure
Converts the departure time from "HH:MM" format to minutes since midnight.
getDestination() - Method in class graph.Edge
 
getDuration() - Method in class model.Departure
Returns the duration of the journey in minutes.
getEdges() - Method in class graph.Graph.Path
 
getEdgesFrom(Node) - Method in class graph.Graph
Dohvata listu grana koje izlaze iz datog cvora.
getFrom() - Method in class model.Departure
Returns the identifier of the departure station.
getId() - Method in class graph.Node
 
getMinTransferTime() - Method in class model.Departure
Returns the minimum required transfer time at the destination station in minutes.
getNeighbors(int, int) - Method in class util.TransportDataGenerator
Retrieves a list of direct neighboring cities for a given city at coordinates (x, y).
getNode(String) - Method in class graph.Graph
Dohvata cvor po njegovom ID-u.
getNodes() - Method in class graph.Graph.Path
 
getNodesMap() - Method in class graph.Graph
 
getNumberOfTransfers() - Method in class graph.Graph.Path
Izracunava ukupan broj presjedanja u putanji.
getPrice() - Method in class model.Departure
Returns the price of the journey.
getSource() - Method in class graph.Edge
 
getStationName() - Method in class graph.Node
 
getStations() - Method in class model.TransportData
Returns the list of all stations.
getTo() - Method in class model.Departure
Returns the identifier of the arrival station.

Izracunava ukupno trajanje putovanja u minutama.
getTotalPrice() - Method in class graph.Graph.Path
Izracunava ukupnu cijenu putovanja.

Izracunava ukupan prihod citajuci sve racune i parsirajuci cene.

Izracunava ukupan broj prodatih karata citajuci sve racune.

getTrainStation() - Method in class model.Station
Returns the unique identifier of the train station.

getType() - Method in class graph.Node
 
getType() - Method in class model.Departure
Returns the type of transportation for this departure.
getWeight() - Method in class graph.Edge
 
graph - package graph
 
Graph - Class in graph
Predstavlja transportni graf sa cvorovima (stanicama) i granama (polascima i transferima).
Graph() - Constructor for class graph.Graph
 
Graph.OptimizationCriteria - Enum Class in graph
Enumeracija za kriterijume optimizacije.
Graph.Path - Class in graph
Klasa koja predstavlja putanju u grafu, cuvajuci cvorove i grane.
